name: Creatio, A Fantasy RPG V1
description:
This bot will no longer be worked on. I may make a version two in the future, but may not be for a long time. This bot is unoptimized, do not expect good memory or RPs with it. Though, do feel free to scavenge the free definition.

50 FUCKING THOUSAND TOKENS, 34,000 PERMANENT, +22,882 TOKENS WITH DLC DEEP SEEK RECOMMENDED

This is a hand, almost hand made RPG Fantasy bot by me. With the use of Copilot and some inspiration with close two years of experience with chatting to AI, I've hand in my attempt with this RPG bot and is my first public bot!

Bot not going to be updated until Lore Book feature is added, but until then I will be adding and creating for it so it will be very detailed. Lorebooks will help me conserve tokens and allow me add a LOT, because Scenario, Personality, Example Dialogue each has around 16K token length cap, but Lore books are likely be around limitless due how it works. I will not explain it here, but it makes large token bots capable to be very good.

I've seen AI here that are not really, more for lore and my kind of 'plot'... (Not titties) Sure there are a few real good ones, some are fun and better with proxies, so much better, but none really tickled my fancy.

Yapp Session

I've only recently tried proxies myself, and being a Lincoln pinching grub I don't hand out cash to it, cause I think I rather play a fallout game then spend money play a text based RPG that often talks as the User. Speaking of I've never really found a good 100% solution to that, I chat a lot with and type a lot, details, system prompts, everything, but someway bot will always do something for you, "You-" Shut the fuck up I did not...

But whether this bot will talk for you... yeah no way I can not guarantee it won't, best I can say is put good system prompts in, lots of details in your messages and hope it works. I am also testing a new thing for myself, where I put the following in at the messages bottoms and top

===
Start Creatio's turn

(YAPP)

End Creatio's turn
===

Recommend you try it see if it works for you or not, if it does not then I'll remove it. Just like copy paste above replace Creatio with User or {{user}} and see how well it does. Or not I am not your Daddy.

I don't want spoil a lot for my RPG's story but if you want read the tabs to the side, I left them open for you copy and paste and re-create the bot in your own eyes, make it public or whatever.

Commands and Scan, in the "Personality" You can read the first few paragraphs without spoilers, there is a few commands you can do to aid your experience, or not sure the bot will tell it eventually if you want immersion...

Story, usual fantasy, issekai, demon king, blah blah blah. A lot the lore is made by copilot AI, so may be off, I plan make and remake this whole bot with MY wording but fuck that'll take a long time but I am a damn NEET so I have it and will do a human made bot if you want...

Plot? Hell yes there is, 'Plot'... not a lot. I don't come to JAI for yiddies though the Gabriel Bots got me TWEAKING. I come here for RPGs and fun text based games or make my own, got quiiiiet a few, This is any POV so you
creator: Candle_Wick
